'''zhomapaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:athalline|athalline]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-m-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:athalline|athalline]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhomapaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhomapithi|zhomapithi]] || [[word:zhomapiji|zhomapiji]] || [[word:zhomapishi|zhomapishi]] || [[word:zhomapiki|zhomapiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhomaputhuthu|zhomaputhuthu]] || [[word:zhomapujuju|zhomapujuju]] || [[word:zhomapushushu|zhomapushushu]] || [[word:zhomapukuku|zhomapukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhomaputhu|zhomaputhu]] || [[word:zhomapuju|zhomapuju]] || [[word:zhomapushu|zhomapushu]] || [[word:zhomapuku|zhomapuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhomapufthuf|zhomapufthuf]] || [[word:zhomapufjuf|zhomapufjuf]] || [[word:zhomapufshuf|zhomapufshuf]] || [[word:zhomapufkuf|zhomapufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhomapethe|zhomapethe]] || [[word:zhomapeje|zhomapeje]] || [[word:zhomapeshe|zhomapeshe]] || [[word:zhomapeke|zhomapeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhomapothotho|zhomapothotho]] || [[word:zhomapojojo|zhomapojojo]] || [[word:zhomaposhosho|zhomaposhosho]] || [[word:zhomapokoko|zhomapokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhomapotho|zhomapotho]] || [[word:zhomapojo|zhomapojo]] || [[word:zhomaposho|zhomaposho]] || [[word:zhomapoko|zhomapoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhomapofthof|zhomapofthof]] || [[word:zhomapofjof|zhomapofjof]] || [[word:zhomapofshof|zhomapofshof]] || [[word:zhomapofkof|zhomapofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhomapĂŻfthĂŻf|zhomapĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhomapĂŻfjĂŻf|zhomapĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhomapĂŻfshĂŻf|zhomapĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhomapĂŻfkĂŻf|zhomapĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhomapĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|zhomapĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhomapĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|zhomapĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhomapĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|zhomapĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhomapĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|zhomapĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhomapĂŻfthĂŻf|zhomapĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhomapĂŻfjĂŻf|zhomapĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhomapĂŻfshĂŻf|zhomapĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhomapĂŻfkĂŻf|zhomapĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhomapĂŻfthĂŻf|zhomapĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhomapĂŻfjĂŻf|zhomapĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhomapĂŻfshĂŻf|zhomapĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhomapĂŻfkĂŻf|zhomapĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhomapĂŠthĂŠ|zhomapĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:zhomapĂŠjĂŠ|zhomapĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:zhomapĂŠshĂŠ|zhomapĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:zhomapĂŠkĂŠ|zhomapĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhomapathatha|zhomapathatha]] || [[word:zhomapajaja|zhomapajaja]] || [[word:zhomapashasha|zhomapashasha]] || [[word:zhomapakaka|zhomapakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhomapatha|zhomapatha]] || [[word:zhomapaja|zhomapaja]] || [[word:zhomapasha|zhomapasha]] || [[word:zhomapaka|zhomapaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhomapafthaf|zhomapafthaf]] || [[word:zhomapafjaf|zhomapafjaf]] || [[word:zhomapafshaf|zhomapafshaf]] || [[word:zhomapafkaf|zhomapafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zhomapasha|zhomapasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhomapshĂ«sha|zhomapshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhomaprosha|zhomaprosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhomapmusha|zhomapmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhomapyasha|zhomapyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhomapnkshĂ«sha|gozhomapnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhomapnkrosha|gozhomapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhomapnkmusha|gozhomapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhomapnkyasha|gozhomapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zhomamapasha|zhomamapasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhomamapshĂ«sha|zhomamapshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhomamaprosha|zhomamaprosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhomamapmusha|zhomamapmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhomamapyasha|zhomamapyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhomamapnkshĂ«sha|gozhomamapnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhomamapnkrosha|gozhomamapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhomamapnkmusha|gozhomamapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhomamapnkyasha|gozhomamapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zhemĂŠpasha|zhemĂŠpasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhemĂŠpshĂ«sha|zhemĂŠpshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhemĂŠprosha|zhemĂŠprosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhemĂŠpmusha|zhemĂŠpmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhemĂŠpyasha|zhemĂŠpyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhemĂŠpnkshĂ«sha|gozhemĂŠpnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhemĂŠpnkrosha|gozhemĂŠpnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhemĂŠpnkmusha|gozhemĂŠpnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhemĂŠpnkyasha|gozhemĂŠpnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zhomfapasha|zhomfapasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhomfapshĂ«sha|zhomfapshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhomfaprosha|zhomfaprosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhomfapmusha|zhomfapmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhomfapyasha|zhomfapyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhomfapnkshĂ«sha|gozhomfapnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhomfapnkrosha|gozhomfapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhomfapnkmusha|gozhomfapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhomfapnkyasha|gozhomfapnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|386eaa0}}
